title: No field on type
explanation: This error occurs when you try to access a field that does not exist on a struct or type. This can be due to a typo, accessing a private field from outside its module, or confusing tuple struct indexing with named field access.

fixes.code: println!("{}", p.x); // Use an existing field

fixes.description: Add the missing field to the struct
Use index syntax for tuple structs

tip: Check the struct definition for the exact field names. Rust uses snake_case for field names by convention.
